root.sql:
SELECT sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year, official_no , c_text , ( '401N' || '|' || trim( (row_number() over ())::text) || '|' || c_text ) as c_tax from ( select sc_fin_send_tax_hr.id_card || '|' || sc_fin_send_tax_hr.prename || '|' || sc_fin_send_tax_hr.memname || '|' || sc_fin_send_tax_hr.memsurname || '|' || sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no || '|' || sc_mem_m_member_address.road || '|' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name ( sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol ) || '|' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name ( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code ) || '|' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_province_name ( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) || '|' || sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode || '|' || trim( to_char( coalesce( sum( sc_fin_send_tax_hr.paid_amount ) ,0 ) ,'9999999.99')) || '|' || trim( to_char( coalesce( sum( sc_fin_send_tax_hr.tax_amount ) ,0 ),'9999999.99')) || '|' || '1' as c_text , sc_fin_send_tax_hr.official_no , sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year FROM sc_fin_send_tax_hr , sc_hr_off_member , sc_mem_m_member_address , sc_acc_m_account_year WHERE sc_fin_send_tax_hr.official_no = sc_hr_off_member.official_no and sc_hr_off_member.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '1' and sc_fin_send_tax_hr.tax_date between sc_acc_m_account_year.beginning_of_account and sc_acc_m_account_year.ending_of_account
GROUP BY sc_fin_send_tax_hr.official_no , sc_fin_send_tax_hr.id_card , sc_fin_send_tax_hr.prename , sc_fin_send_tax_hr.memname , sc_fin_send_tax_hr.memsurname , sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no , sc_mem_m_member_address.road , sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol , sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode , sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year ORDER BY sc_fin_send_tax_hr.official_no ASC ) tb , sc_acc_m_account_year where sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year = tb.account_year /*WHERE*/
union all
SELECT sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year, official_no , c_text , ( '401N' || '|' || trim( (row_number() over ())::text) || '|' || c_text ) as c_tax from ( select sc_fin_send_tax_fin.id_card || '|' || sc_fin_send_tax_fin.prename || '|' || sc_fin_send_tax_fin.memname || '|' || sc_fin_send_tax_fin.memsurname || '|' || sc_fin_ucf_company.address_no || '|' || sc_fin_ucf_company.road || '|' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name ( sc_fin_ucf_company.tambol ) || '|' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name ( sc_fin_ucf_company.province_code , sc_fin_ucf_company.district_code ) || '|' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_province_name ( sc_fin_ucf_company.province_code ) || '|' || sc_fin_ucf_company.postcode || '|' || trim( to_char( coalesce( sum( sc_fin_send_tax_fin.paid_amount ),0) ,'9999999.99')) || '|' || trim( to_char( coalesce( sum( sc_fin_send_tax_fin.tax_amount ),0) ,'9999999.99')) || '|' || '1' as c_text , sc_fin_send_tax_fin.company_id as official_no , sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year FROM sc_fin_send_tax_fin , sc_fin_ucf_company , sc_acc_m_account_year WHERE sc_fin_send_tax_fin.company_id = sc_fin_ucf_company.company_id and sc_fin_send_tax_fin.tax_date between sc_acc_m_account_year.beginning_of_account and sc_acc_m_account_year.ending_of_account
GROUP BY sc_fin_send_tax_fin.company_id , sc_fin_send_tax_fin.id_card , sc_fin_send_tax_fin.prename , sc_fin_send_tax_fin.memname , sc_fin_send_tax_fin.memsurname , sc_fin_ucf_company.address_no , sc_fin_ucf_company.road , sc_fin_ucf_company.tambol , sc_fin_ucf_company.district_code , sc_fin_ucf_company.province_code , sc_fin_ucf_company.postcode , sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year ORDER BY sc_fin_send_tax_fin.company_id ASC ) tb , sc_acc_m_account_year where sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year = tb.account_year /*WHERE*/
